content.json:
# 🛡️ SpyCloud Threat Intelligence Dashboard

**Darknet exposure monitoring** — breach credentials, infostealer infections, phished accounts, and automated remediation tracking.

---

content.query:
let watchlist = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange};
let mde = Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange};
let ca = SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange};
union isfuzzy=true
(watchlist | summarize v=count() | extend Metric="Total Exposures", Icon="🔍", Order=1),
(watchlist | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Metric="Unique Users", Icon="👤", Order=2),
(watchlist | where severity >= 20 | summarize v=dcount(infected_machine_id) | extend Metric="Infected Devices", Icon="💻", Order=3),
(watchlist | where severity == 25 | summarize v=count() | extend Metric="Critical (Sev 25)", Icon="🔴", Order=4),
(watchlist | where severity == 20 | summarize v=count() | extend Metric="High (Sev 20)", Icon="🟠", Order=5),
(watchlist | where isnotempty(password_plaintext) | summarize v=count() | extend Metric="Plaintext PWs", Icon="🔑", Order=6),
(mde | summarize v=count() | extend Metric="MDE Actions", Icon="🛡️", Order=7),
(ca | summarize v=count() | extend Metric="CA Actions", Icon="🔒", Order=8)
| project Label=strcat(Icon, " ", Metric), Value=v, Order
| order by Order asc

SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), tostring(severity)
| extend SeverityLabel = case(
    severity == "25", "P1 Critical (25)",
    severity == "20", "P1 High (20)",
    severity == "5", "P3 Standard (5)",
    severity == "2", "P4 Low (2)",
    strcat("Other (", severity, ")")
  )
| project TimeGenerated, SeverityLabel, Count
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Exposure Trend by Severity

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(
    severity == 25, "P1 Critical (25)",
    severity == 20, "P1 High (20)",
    severity == 5, "P3 Standard (5)",
    severity == 2, "P4 Low (2)",
    strcat("Other (", tostring(severity), ")")
  )
| summarize Count=count() by SeverityLabel
| order by Count desc
content.title: Severity Distribution

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(breach_category)
| order by Count desc
content.title: Breach Category Breakdown

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize
    Exposures=count(),
    MaxSev=max(severity),
    PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)),
    Domains=dcount(target_domain),
    Sources=dcount(source_id),
    Latest=max(TimeGenerated)
    by email
| top 25 by MaxSev desc, Exposures desc
| extend SevIndicator = case(
    MaxSev == 25, "🔴 CRITICAL",
    MaxSev == 20, "🟠 HIGH",
    MaxSev == 5, "🟡 STANDARD",
    "🔵 LOW"
  )
| project email, SevIndicator, Exposures, PlaintextPWs, Domains, Sources, Latest
content.title: Top 25 Most Exposed Users

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(password_type)
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(password_type)
| order by Count desc
| take 15
content.title: Password Type Distribution

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(target_domain)
| summarize Exposures=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email) by tostring(target_domain)
| order by Exposures desc
| take 20
content.title: Top Targeted Domains

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email_domain)
| summarize Exposures=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email) by tostring(email_domain)
| order by Exposures desc
| take 15
content.title: Top Exposed Email Domains

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 and isnotempty(infected_machine_id)
| summarize
    Users=dcount(email),
    MaxSev=max(severity),
    Domains=dcount(target_domain),
    Latest=max(TimeGenerated)
    by tostring(infected_machine_id), tostring(user_hostname)
| top 25 by MaxSev desc, Users desc
| extend SevIndicator = case(
    MaxSev == 25, "🔴 CRITICAL",
    MaxSev == 20, "🟠 HIGH",
    "🟡 OTHER"
  )
| project infected_machine_id, user_hostname, SevIndicator, Users, Domains, Latest
content.title: Top 25 Infected Devices

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(breach_title)
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(breach_title)
| order by Count desc
| take 15
content.title: Top Malware Families / Breach Sources

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 and isnotempty(country_code)
| summarize Devices=dcount(infected_machine_id), Users=dcount(email) by tostring(country_code)
| order by Devices desc
| take 20
content.title: Infections by Country

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 and isnotempty(user_os)
| summarize Devices=dcount(infected_machine_id) by tostring(user_os)
| order by Devices desc
| take 10
content.title: Infected Device OS Distribution

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    Emails=dcountif(email, isnotempty(email)),
    Phones=countif(isnotempty(phone)),
    SSNs=countif(isnotempty(national_id)),
    DOBs=countif(isnotempty(dob)),
    Addresses=countif(isnotempty(address_1)),
    FullNames=countif(isnotempty(full_name))
| project pack_all()
| mv-expand bagexpansion=array pack_all()
| extend PII_Type=tostring(pack_all_[0]), Count=tolong(pack_all_[1])
| where Count > 0
| order by Count desc
content.title: PII Types Exposed

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Metric="🖥️ MDE Isolations", Order=1),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Metric="🔒 CA Resets/Revokes", Order=2),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20 | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Metric="⚠️ High-Sev Users", Order=3),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity == 25 | summarize v=dcount(infected_machine_id) | extend Metric="🔴 Critical Devices", Order=4)
| project Label=Metric, Value=v, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Remediation Summary

content.query:
Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Actions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: MDE Device Isolation Timeline

content.query:
SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Actions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Conditional Access Remediation Timeline

content.query:
SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by source_id
| project source_id, breach_title, status, description, TimeGenerated
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent Breach Catalog Entries

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL"),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL"),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL"),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | summarize Records=count(), Latest=max(TimeGenerated), Earliest=min(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL")
| project Table, Records, Earliest, Latest, AgeHours=datetime_diff('hour', now(), Latest)
| extend Status = case(AgeHours <= 1, "🟢 Active", AgeHours <= 6, "🟡 Delayed", AgeHours <= 24, "🟠 Stale", "🔴 No Data")
| order by Records desc
content.title: Data Pipeline Health

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Table="Watchlist"),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Table="Catalog")
| project TimeGenerated, Table, Count
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Daily Ingestion Volume
